Safe Haven (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $71,399,120Details
International Box Office $22,651,831
Worldwide Box Office $94,050,951
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,070,560
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,663,713
Total $29,734,273
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a mysterious young woman arrives in a small North Carolina town, her reluctance to join the tight knit community raises questions about her past. Slowly, she begins putting down roots, and gains the courage to start a relationship with Alex, a widowed store owner with two young children. But dark secrets intrude on her new life with such terror that she is forced to rediscover the meaning of sacrifice and rely on the power of love in this romantic thriller.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,401,594 (30.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:75.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,223 opening theaters/3,223 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $105,034,873

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2013 (Wide) by Relativity
International Releases: February 13th, 2013 (Wide) (Philippines)
February 14th, 2013 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
February 14th, 2013 (Wide) (Australia)
February 14th, 2013 (Wide) (Ukraine)
February 14th, 2013 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: May 7th, 2013 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material involving threatening behavior, and for violence and sexuality.
(Rating bulletin 2254, 1/9/2013)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Romance, Widow/Widower

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

When a mysterious young woman arrives in a small North Carolina town, her reluctance to join the tight knit community raises questions about her past. Slowly, she begins putting down roots, and gains the courage to start a relationship with Alex, a widowed store owner with two young children. But dark secrets intrude on her new life with such terror that she is forced to rediscover the meaning of sacrifice and rely on the power of love in this romantic thriller.
